task_completion.description: Open and view the specification document on the workstation desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A document viewer or text editor is open displaying the specification document for the temporary scaffold tower.

task_completion.description: Use the pre-loaded FZK-Haus IFC model in Bonsai.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai (Blender) application is open and actively displaying the 3D model of the FZK-Haus.

task_completion.description: Model IfcMember entities for the scaffold tower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Linear scaffolding elements (e.g., tubes, frames, poles) are visible in the 3D viewport, or 'IfcMember' entities are newly listed in the Bonsai project outliner/tree.

task_completion.description: Model IfcPlate entities for the scaffold tower.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Flat scaffolding elements (e.g., platforms, boards, base plates) are visible in the 3D viewport, or 'IfcPlate' entities are newly listed in the Bonsai project outliner/tree.

task_completion.description: Aggregate the IfcMember and IfcPlate entities into an IfcElementAssembly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bonsai project outliner/tree shows an 'IfcElementAssembly' object acting as a parent or container grouping the scaffold's IfcMember and IfcPlate entities.
A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog in Bonsai showing the file path '/home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_scaffold.ifc', or a file manager/terminal window confirming the file exists in that specific directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Bonsai GUI to model the scaffold rather than relying solely on terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the Bonsai (Blender) interface, such as using modeling tools, navigating the outliner, or accessing IFC properties panels.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the required IFC entities rather than just renaming existing parts of the FZK-Haus.
integrity.visual_evidence: The outliner shows distinct, newly created IfcMember and IfcPlate entities that form a scaffold, separate from the main building's structural elements.

integrity.description: The output file was saved from the BIM software, not created as a dummy text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a basic text editor (like nano or gedit) or terminal commands (like touch or echo) to create a fake 'fzk_scaffold.ifc' file.
